---
title: "Final DFD Analysis"
author: "Britt"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
PM.counts <- read.table("Psme_RNASeq_July2024_Psme.1_0_counts.txt", header = TRUE) 
PM.counts
```

```{r}
PM.counts <- PM.counts[rowSums(PM.counts[,-1] > 10) >= 3,]
PM.counts
```

```{r}
library(tibble)
PM.counts.noid <- as_tibble(PM.counts)
PM.counts.noid
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
sample.description <- tibble(sample=colnames(TC.counts.noid))
sample.description <- sample.description %>%
  mutate(
    myc = c("NM", "NM", "NM", "NM", "M", "NM", "M", "M", "M", "NM", "M", "NM", "NM", "M", "NM", "M", "NM", "NM", "NM", "M", "NA"),  
    trt = c("C", "C", "T", "C", "C", "T", "T", "T", "C", "C", "C", "C", "T", "T", "C", "C", "C", "T", "T", "T", "NA"),  
    group = paste(myc, trt, sep = "_")
  )
sample.description <- sample.description %>%
  slice(1:(n() - 1))
sample.description <- sample.description %>%
  mutate(myc=factor(myc, levels = c("NM","M")), 
         trt=factor(trt,levels = c("C","T"))) # setting the levels in this way makes "C and NM" the reference
sample.description
```


```{r}
library(edgeR)

counts.matrix.PM <- PM.counts %>% as.matrix()

#remove unassigned row
counts.matrix.PM <- counts.matrix.PM[, -21]

counts.matrix.PM
```

```{r}
dge.data <- DGEList(counts=counts.matrix.PM, 
                    group=sample.description$group)
dim(dge.data) 
dge.data <- calcNormFactors(dge.data, method = "TMM")
dge.data$samples # look at the normalization factors
```

(make ordination here)

```{r}
# Ensure levels are set correctly
sample.description$myc <- relevel(factor(sample.description$myc), ref = "NM")
sample.description$trt <- relevel(factor(sample.description$trt), ref = "C")
```


```{r}
#sample.description is the original descriptive dataset (describes our samples but doesn't have counts data)

interaction.design <- model.matrix(~myc*trt,data = sample.description)
rownames(interaction.design) <- sample.description$sample
interaction.design
```
```{r}
# Modern, clean workflow for the Interaction model
dge.data <- estimateDisp(dge.data, interaction.design)

# View the dispersion estimates
summary(dge.data$tagwise.dispersion)
```



```{r}
# 1. Fit using the QL model instead of glmFit
fit <- glmQLFit(dge.data, interaction.design)

# 2. Test using the QL F-test instead of glmLRT
# Treatment Effect
trt.qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = "trtT")

# Mycorrhization Effect (spM)
myc.qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = "mycM")

# Interaction Effect (The Synergy)
interaction.qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = "mycM:trtT")
```


```{r}
summary(decideTests(myc.qlf, p.value=0.06))
summary(decideTests(trt.qlf, p.value=0.06))
summary(decideTests(interaction.qlf, p.value=0.06))
```

```{r}
top10.trt <- topTags(trt.qlf)
top10.myc <- topTags(myc.qlf) 
top10.interaction <- topTags(interaction.qlf)

top10.trt
top10.myc
top10.interaction
```

```{r}
# Visualizing the dispersion/BCV
plotBCV(dge.data)
```

```{r}
# This will show you if you have an outlier sample
plotMDS(dge.data, col=as.numeric(sample.description$myc))
```
